title: What are some English patched Eva games
display_title: What are some English patched Eva games
wikitext:
[]: What are some English patched Eva games?             Quote Post by AdamMalkovitch » Tue Aug 04, 2020 11:49 pm Or at least games that a player who can only read like 20 Hiragana can understand, like 3nd Impact or Battle Orchestra (two of the best). Jo and Evangelion 2 on PS2 both disappointed me in that they mostly consisted of walking around talking to people instead of sick ass action. And like, I get that NGE is about the characters, but make it optional man, I wanna beat the fuck out of Zeruel in a badass recreation of the iconic fight, like how Dragon Ball Z Kakarot did it. Regardless, what are some English patched Eva games?

[]: Re: What are some English patched Eva games?             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Aug 05, 2020 1:27 am Some have been mentioned previously on the forum; search tool is actually helpful here. search.php?keywords=english+patch&terms=all&author=&fid%5B%5D=7&sc=1&sf=all&sr=topics&sk=t&sd=d&st=0&ch=300&t=0&submit=Search

[]: Re: What are some English patched Eva games?             Quote Post by AdamMalkovitch » Wed Aug 05, 2020 6:19 pm Reichu wrote: Some have been mentioned previously on the forum; search tool is actually helpful here. search.php?keywords=english+patch&terms=all&author=&fid%5B%5D=7&sc=1&sf=all&sr=topics&sk=t&sd=d&st=0&ch=300&t=0&submit=Search

[]: Re: What are some English patched Eva games?             Quote Post by Blockio » Wed Aug 05, 2020 7:26 pm AdamMalkovitch wrote: Oh I get ya, I tried searching "english games" and both terms were ignored since they're so common, but your search for "patch" brings up results. I wonder if there's a forum out there that's been used so much that like most of the English language is ignored as search terms...

Jo and Evangelion 2 on PS2 both disappointed me in that they mostly consisted of walking around talking to people instead of sick ass action. And like, I get that NGE is about the characters, but make it optional man, I wanna beat the fuck out of Zeruel in a badass recreation of the iconic fight, like how Dragon Ball Z Kakarot did it.
